title: SshRunbook
description: Declares an SSH target host. Validates connectivity on create and exposes connection attributes to dependent task resources.

runbookId.description: Unique identifier assigned by the runtime on create.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the remote machine.

privateKeyPath.description: Absolute path to the private key file on the machine running cdkx deploy.

executionId.description: Unique identifier assigned by the runtime on create.
